title: .NET Developer (Arabic Speaker)
overview: Develop and maintain enterprise web applications and business solutions using .NET technologies, ensuring strong performance, scalability, and security. The role includes system integrations, API and database development, cloud services, migrations, technical documentation, and support throughout the Software Development Life Cycle.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain enterprise web applications and business solutions using .NET technologies
Design and implement scalable, secure, and high-performance software solutions
Develop and integrate Web APIs, workflows, web parts, features, and web services
Work with multi-tier and multi-tenant application architectures
Design and develop databases supported by the .NET Framework
Support system integrations, migrations, and ERP-related development
Implement and maintain Azure CI/CD pipelines and cloud-based services
Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Prepare technical documentation and follow SDLC best practices
Support and continuously improve existing applications and services
qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related technical field
Strong experience with .NET Core and C#
Experience with Angular and multi-tenant architecture
Experience with Azure, cloud services, and CI/CD
Experience with Web APIs, scalable ERP systems, and application migrations
Experience with SharePoint development, including workflows, web parts, features, and web services
Experience with database design and development for .NET-based systems
Experience with Crystal Reports and RDLC
preferredSkills: Advanced knowledge of enterprise application architecture and integration

title: Windows Server Administrator
status: On contract start, hiring will begin if you have been accepted and passed interviews
overview: Seeking a Windows Server Administrator to manage, maintain, secure, and support Windows Server infrastructure and related enterprise services.
responsibilities: Install, configure, and maintain Windows Server systems
Manage Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy
Monitor server health, performance, and capacity
Apply patches, updates, and security configurations
Manage virtual environments on Hyper-V and Nutanix AHV
Troubleshoot and resolve server issues
Manage file shares, permissions, and user access
Perform backups and disaster recovery testing
Document configurations, procedures, and changes
Work with the IT team to plan and execute infrastructure upgrades
Ensure high availability, security, and performance of servers supporting business operations within SLA requirements
qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field preferred
3+ years of experience managing Windows Server environments
Strong knowledge of Windows Server 2016, 2019, 2022, and 2025
Experience with virtualization, including Nutanix and Hyper-V
preferredSkills: Experience with Azure or other cloud platforms
Knowledge of backup and disaster recovery tools
Experience with security compliance and hardening
